query:
-- Check workbook line items for bundle indicators
SELECT 
  productName,
  wbProductType,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  AVG(amountExGst) as avgAmount,
  MIN(amountExGst) as minAmount,
  MAX(amountExGst) as maxAmount
FROM supplier_workbook_line_items swli
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads swu ON swli.uploadId = swu.id
WHERE swu.supplier = 'SasBoss'
AND (
  productName LIKE '%bundle%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Bundle%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Legal%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Compliance%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Medical%' OR
  wbProductType LIKE '%bundle%'
)
GROUP BY productName, wbProductType
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 30;
